name: tampermonkey-x-post-mode
description: Simplify X UI to a post-only compose view, with a toggle button

scripts.lint: bun run eslint ; bun run prettier
scripts.prettier: prettier x-post-mode.user.js > /dev/null && echo 'Prettier: No issues found' || echo 'Prettier: Issues found'
scripts.fix: bun run eslint:fix && bun run prettier:fix

author: aiya000
